description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a modern, rectangular layout set on a green lawn. The structure features a wide, overhanging flat roof that extends beyond the main walls, providing shade and architectural interest. The exterior walls are light-colored, and the building is punctuated by several rectangular windows arranged in a linear fashion along the longer sides. At one end, there is a small covered porch area with supporting posts, suggesting an entryway. The property includes a small fenced section and what appear to be utility or storage units adjacent to the building. The overall design is clean and minimalistic, with a focus on horizontal lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat overhanging roof, light exterior, and linear window arrangement, set on a green lawn with a small porch and adjacent utility units.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long facade with multiple evenly spaced windows and the wide flat roof overhang.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the small covered porch with supporting posts and the entryway, as well as the adjacent utility units.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a similar window arrangement and visible roof overhang, plus a small fenced area at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the porch, the utility units, and the open lawn area.
attribute_window_arrangement: linear side windows with asymmetrical spacing
